narrative:
Most of the High Country enjoys a nice day today, however, a shower or two from Avery county south could move in from TN this morning. By afternoon, all areas are dry with near average temperatures. Sunday is a pleasant day but showers and thundershowers develop Monday. Isolated showers are possible Tuesday afternoon but overall, it is a nice day. Temperatures will be on the cool side for the next several days.

2027 Blue Ridge Cameo Photo Winners Announced

The second set of winning photos, the "Cameo Winners," has been announced. We receive so many amazing photos in the Photo Contest (851 this year), choosing only 15 winners is just not enough to tell the story. So, we feature an additional 36 "Cameos" throughout the calendar. See our Photo Contest page to see this second set of winning photos.

Pleasant Saturday Afternoon

Last Updated Sat May 30 at 10:35AM by Wayne Presnell

Most of the High Country enjoys a nice day today, however, a shower or two from Avery county south could move in from TN this morning. By afternoon, all areas are dry with near average temperatures. Sunday is a pleasant day but showers and thundershowers develop Monday. Isolated showers are possible Tuesday afternoon but overall, it is a nice day. Temperatures will be on the cool side for the next several days.

2027 Blue Ridge Cameo Photo Winners Announced

The second set of winning photos, the "Cameo Winners," has been announced. We receive so many amazing photos in the Photo Contest (851 this year), choosing only 15 winners is just not enough to tell the story. So, we feature an additional 36 "Cameos" throughout the calendar. See our Photo Contest page to see this second set of winning photos.

Forecast Discussion

A cold front is slipping through this morning from the north. Most of the rain is south of the High Country but areas from Avery County and south may get a little wet this morning. By afternoon, cooler and drier air settles in.

High pressure takes over Sunday, providing pleasant weather. A cold front moving in from the north Sunday night and Monday should spark scattered showers and thundershowers begining early Monday morning and winding down by evening. Temperatures remain cool.

Cooler air moves in Tuesday and much of the day is nice. However, the air aloft is quite cold and with the sun warming surface temperatures by afternoon, there could be isolated showers and thundershowers develop late Tuesday afternoon and evening.

Wednesday through Friday are pleasant weather days with cool temperatures and dry weather as high pressure takes over. Low temperatures mid to late week will be in the 40s with some of the cooler valleys getting near 40. Temperatures begin to warm a little by Friday.

Detailed forecast discussion and analysis is only available to RaysWeather supporters.

Latest Insights
Monday Message for May 25, 2026

It's the Memorial Day Monday Message, where we recap our sorely-needed drought relief and discuss our region's cyclical warm/cool periods.

May 25, 2026
Rainy, Cool Saturday

It's a rainy, cool Saturday around western North Carolina and Southwest Virginia. High temperatures are running as much as 20-degrees below normal in the heart of the cold air damming zone.

Sunday and Memorial Day will continue to be unsettled, but temperatures will moderate and there will be additional breaks in the clouds, as the rainfall pattern becomes more convective, or showery in nature.

While the rainfall is falling on our holiday weekend, it's entirely beneficial with respect to our long-standing drought conditions.
